name: sbom --dry-run previews the bill of materials without writing an artifact
command: printf '%s' '{"dependencies":{"lodash":"4.17.21","express":"4.18.0"}}' > package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/sbom.sh" --root . --dry-run 2>e.txt; grep -q 'dry-run=1' e.txt && echo h15-dry-run 1>&2
